kinkaku-ji.name: Kinkaku-ji (Golden Pavilion)
kinkaku-ji.notes: Stunning with a dusting of snow — worth a winter return.

fushimi-inari.name: Fushimi Inari Taisha
fushimi-inari.notes: Go at dawn to beat crowds; the torii gate trail is open 24h.

kiyomizu-dera.name: Kiyomizu-dera
kiyomizu-dera.notes: Late-November maple foliage is spectacular — reason to plan an autumn trip.

arashiyama-bamboo.name: Arashiyama Bamboo Grove
arashiyama-bamboo.notes: Best before 8am. Far west of the city — cluster with other Arashiyama stops.

nishiki-market.name: Nishiki Market
nishiki-market.notes: Covered arcade — a good rainy-day option.

gion.name: Gion District
gion.notes: Atmospheric after dark; chance of spotting geiko on the way to appointments.
